subject: Opal, an elderly woman trainer in an elaborate hat and gown, leaning on a cane, surrounded by floating bauble-like shapes
description: An elderly woman stands centered, leaning slightly on a long curved cane. She wears a tall pointed hat with a wide swooping brim and a flowing layered gown in deep purple and white tones; a long braid of pink-tinged hair falls forward across her shoulder. Her painted, made-up face reads theatrical and composed. She holds the cane forward as if presenting it. Behind her the stage-like setting glows with rounded pastel orbs and lantern-shapes in pink, mint, and lavender, suggesting a bauble-strung performance venue. A spotlight effect rims her silhouette and the floor catches reflected highlights. The card is a Trainer Supporter, with the Pokemon Trainer banner across the top.
foreground: elderly woman in tall pointed hat and layered gown holding a curved cane
background: stage-like venue strung with rounded pastel baubles and lanterns, soft spotlight glow
